objective_checks.detail: all pinned refs carry version comments

dimensions.name: Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Every remote marketplace ref across both workflow files (ci.yml and the differently-named release.yaml) was pinned to a full commit SHA, including the second checkout instance in the lint job.

dimensions.name: Restraint
dimensions.rationale: The agent correctly left the local action, the docker ref, and all unrelated content untouched, changing only the remote refs that needed pinning.

dimensions.name: Communication
dimensions.rationale: It clearly stated which refs it pinned and why it skipped the local/docker refs, but gave no account of how the SHAs were obtained or verified as authentic for each tag.
